title: During Camp
excerpt: Whether you’re a first-time family or a Camp Barney veteran, you are bound to have questions about your child’s time during camp. contentHtml:
Whether you’re a first-time family or a Camp Barney veteran, you are bound to have questions about your child’s time during camp. Here you will find a few quick links to make sure your specific during camp questions are covered.

  • Birthdays: Details about celebrating your child’s special day at camp
  • Food at Camp: Camp Barney is very deliberate and intentional in ensuring our campers are well-fed, energized, and enjoying every meal
  • Communicating at Camp: All the ways to stay in contact with your child(ren) during camp
  • Healthy Campers: Our commitment to keeping your child(ren) safe and healthy
contentText:
Whether you’re a first-time family or a Camp Barney veteran, you are bound to have questions about your child’s time during camp. Here you will find a few quick links to make sure your specific during camp questions are covered.

Birthdays
:
 Details about celebrating your child’s special day at camp

: Camp Barney is very deliberate and intentional in ensuring our campers are well-fed, energized, and enjoying every meal

Communicating at Camp
:
 All the ways to stay in contact with your child(ren) during camp

Healthy Campers
:
 Our commitment to keeping your child(ren) safe and healthy
